options.name: -attacker
options.description: Specifies the attackers which should be made quiet for given victim net(s). If no attacker is specified, all the aggressors of given victim(s) will be ignored.

options.name: -transition
options.description: Specifies the victim transition for which attackers will be assumed quiet. If no value is specified, attackers are skipped for both rise and fall transitions of the victim net.

options.name: -victim
options.description: Specifies a list of victim nets for which attackers should be made quiet.

options.name: -view
options.description: Specifies the view for which attackers should be made quiet. If no view is specified, attackers are assumed quiet in all views.
